sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναγκάζω

- Transliteration: Anagkazo

- Phonetic: an-ang-kad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to necessitate, compel, drive to, constrain

a. by force, threats, etc.

b. by permission, entreaties, etc.

c. by other means

- Origin: from G318

- TDNT entry: 06:44,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G318; to necessitate: - compel constrain.
